meta.intent: Cap the dock-discipline band by making dock management and rescue order part of the same three-puppy decision.
meta.expectedPath: Rescue the most water-threatened puppy first, cash a planned dock triple during the pivot, then finish the middle and top rescues in a clean order.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player takes broad tempting clears, overfills the dock or delays the endangered puppy, and understands which decision caused the loss.
meta.whatItProves: The first dock-focused campaign band can end on a fair challenge where rescue order, dock cost, and water pressure are integrated.
meta.notes: Role: capstone. Full visual occupancy is intentional for the final dock-discipline read: broad tempting clears compete with lower and middle rescue priority, while the safer top target prevents all three rescues from feeling equally urgent.
